title: corydalis flexuosa subsp. pinnatibracteata
intro: Corydalis flexuosa subsp. pinnatibracteata, also known as Himalayan corydalis or corydalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and spasmolytic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as tetrahydroprotoberberine. The health benefits of Corydalis flexuosa subsp. pinnatibracteata include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
